text:
(a) A person is automatically disqualified under Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (a)(1)(B), Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (b)(2), or Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (d)(2). An appeal may not be taken from the disqualification.

(b) Disqualifying a person under Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (a), other than under Subdivision (1)(B) of that subsection, Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (b)(1), or Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (d)(1) or (3) is subject to the notice and hearing procedures of Sections 521.295-521.303. An appeal of the disqualification is subject to Section 521.308 (Appeal; Judicial Review) .

(c) A disqualification imposed under Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (a) must run consecutively to any other disqualification that is then currently in effect.

(d) A disqualification imposed under Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (a)(1)(B) or 522.081 (Disqualification) (b)(2) or (d)(2) takes effect on the 10th day after the date the department issues the order of disqualification.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 522. Commercial Driver's Licenses
##### § 522.087 — Procedures Applicable to Disqualification

(a) A person is automatically disqualified under Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (a)(1)(B), Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (b)(2), or Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (d)(2). An appeal may not be taken from the disqualification.

(b) Disqualifying a person under Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (a), other than under Subdivision (1)(B) of that subsection, Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (b)(1), or Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (d)(1) or (3) is subject to the notice and hearing procedures of Sections 521.295-521.303. An appeal of the disqualification is subject to Section 521.308 (Appeal; Judicial Review) .

(c) A disqualification imposed under Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (a) must run consecutively to any other disqualification that is then currently in effect.

(d) A disqualification imposed under Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (a)(1)(B) or 522.081 (Disqualification) (b)(2) or (d)(2) takes effect on the 10th day after the date the department issues the order of disqualification.

*Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 752 (H.B.1888), Sec. 33, eff. January 1, 2016.*

subsections.text: Disqualifying a person under Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (a), other than under Subdivision (1)(B) of that subsection, Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (b)(1), or Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (d)(1) or (3) is subject to the notice and hearing procedures of Sections 521.295-521.303. An appeal of the disqualification is subject to Section 521.308 (Appeal; Judicial Review) .

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: A disqualification imposed under Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (a) must run consecutively to any other disqualification that is then currently in effect.

subsections.label: d
subsections.text: A disqualification imposed under Section 522.081 (Disqualification) (a)(1)(B) or 522.081 (Disqualification) (b)(2) or (d)(2) takes effect on the 10th day after the date the department issues the order of disqualification.
